title: callitriche autumnalis f. microphylla
intro: Callitriche autumnalis f. microphylla, also known as dwarf water starwort, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Callitriche autumnalis f. microphylla include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
